## Summary

Describe the change and the reason for it.

## Testing

- [ ] I ran relevant automated tests, or no automated tests were available
- [ ] I performed manual verification and described it below

## Manual Verification

Describe what you tested, on which device or environment, and what you observed.

## Checklist

- [ ] My change is focused and does not include unrelated churn
- [ ] I updated docs when setup, behavior, or contribution workflow changed
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, keystores, or private service credentials
- [ ] I preserved license, attribution, and branding expectations
